sentiment.reasoning: The loss of a key contract in a major region directly impacts revenue and competitive positioning.

headlines.headline: Zrovum Biopharma sees 20% margin improvement in latest quarter

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
